MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Naim Jamali, is present.
Attorney Luis Molina,, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Bruce Lind, is present.
Attorney, Peter Chess , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-24-2010 is vacated.
